page_metadata.biotools__summary: survGenesInterim is an R package for simulation of survival studies based on simulated gene expression level and patient data. Includes functions to generate such data. Resulting error and power rate can be visualized.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: survGenesInterim is an R package for simulation of survival studies based on simulated gene expression level and patient data. Includes functions to generate such data. Resulting error and power rate can be visualized.
